chapters.title: Rational Numbers
chapters.details: Learn fractions, integers and operations on rational numbers.

chapters.title: Linear Equations in One Variable
chapters.details: Understand algebraic equations and how to solve them step by step.

chapters.title: Squares and Square Roots
chapters.details: Explore squares, square roots and their applications.

chapters.title: Cube and Cube Roots
chapters.details: Understand cubes, cube roots and their properties.

chapters.title: Sets
chapters.details: Learn the basics of sets, notation and set operations.

chapters.title: Ratio and Proportion
chapters.details: Study ratios, proportions and real-life comparisons.

chapters.title: Percentage
chapters.details: Understand percentages and their everyday applications.

chapters.title: Profit and Loss
chapters.details: Learn calculations related to business profit and loss.

chapters.title: Simple Interest
chapters.details: Understand the concept of interest and financial calculations.

chapters.title: Algebraic Expressions and Identities
chapters.details: Work with algebraic expressions and important identities.

chapters.title: Direct and Inverse Variation
chapters.details: Study relationships between quantities and variation.

chapters.title: Introduction to Graphs
chapters.details: Learn how mathematical relationships are shown using graphs.

chapters.title: Perimeter and Area
chapters.details: Calculate perimeter and area of common geometric shapes.

chapters.title: Volume and Surface Area of Solids
chapters.details: Understand volume and surface area of three-dimensional shapes.

chapters.title: Data Handling
chapters.details: Collect, organize and interpret data using charts and graphs.
